summary: Russian forces reported downing a Ukrainian Ka-52 helicopter near Nadiivka, Donetsk region, with an FPV drone, then striking the surviving crew during evacuation. In the Sumy region, a fiber-optic FPV drone "KVN" destroyed a Ukrainian BMP-1L and a nearby pickup truck, with objective control provided by a Zala Z-16 wing drone. In the Kharkiv region, an FPV drone struck and destroyed a Ukrainian UAV in Karachne. Russian operators from the "Rubikon" center eliminated 114 Ukrainian targets on March 26 and 127 on March 25, including personnel and fixed-wing UAVs, across multiple directions including Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman.
